title: phalaris aquatica var. minor
intro: Phalaris aquatica var. minor, also known as minor water millet or lesser water grass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as treating urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Phalaris aquatica var. minor is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
